messages.content: I'm doing well, thanks for asking. How can I assist you today, Sir?
I can answer questions, open apps or websites, generate images, play music, write content, and search the web for you, all to help make your life a bit easier, Sir.
Generate an image of Tony Stark.
I'm working on the generate image in the background. I'll open it for you when it's ready.
I've started playing that for you.
Jarvis, can you list, uh, can you give me a list of top trending videos about the topic of AI?
Jarvis, can you list, uh, can you give me a list of top trending videos about the topic of AI?
Some trending AI videos include animated dance videos, dog dance reels, and AI-generated content, with popular formats and tools like AI animation and viral AI challenges, Sir.
